examples: Look at your work environment like an anthropologist.
The biological anthropologist Christy Turner is an expert in the analysis of changing physical characteristics in human teeth.
The anthropologist Alexander Marshack has an interesting interpretation of some of the engravings made during the Upper Paleolithic.
On January 6, 1973, the anthropologist Margaret Mead published a startling little essay in TV Guide.
Anthropologist Peggy Reeves Sanday found evidence for cannibalism in 34% of cultures in one cross-historical sample.
